video_details.title: He Almost Quit Trading, Then He Made $100 Million | Lance Breitstein Interview
video_details.description:
Big thanks to my good friend, the one and only Lance Breitstein, aka, theonelanceb! Lance has 15 years of trading experience, with most of it coming on Wall Street, and he'll be featured in the next Market Wizards book. He’s made over $100 Million in verified trading profits and is one of the best traders in the world. We talk about his trading journey and what it actually takes to become a profitable trader.

You can check out more videos right over there, and also click ‘subscribe’ so that you can watch all of these videos, get that knowledge, and become my next student.*
